title: 10mm Tile Backer Boards (1250 x 600 x 10mm) - Pack of 10 with Stainless Steel Washers
features: Pack contains 10x Tile Backer Boards 1250 x 600 x 10mm (LxWxD) and 75 washers (15 per board).
Thermopanel Tile Backer Boards are ideal for use with Electric Underfloor Heating, as they are lightweight and easy to handle whilst providing superior waterproofing to your wet area.
Tile Backer Boards are easy to install and are particularly suited to underfloor heating mats and under tile heating cable applications.
Their lightweight and durable design mean Thermopanel Tile Backer Boards will accept even the heaviest wall tiles, unlike plasterboard (correct installation method must be followed!).
